nextManualSteps: Open a fresh fixture containing exactly `Paragraph one\n\nParagraph two`.
Place the caret at the visual start of `Paragraph two` with screenshot evidence before pressing Backspace.
Press Backspace, insert `FM_SENTINEL_STRUCT_BACKSPACE`, save, and promote only if the sentinel/source prove the action started at offset 15 rather than after the first paragraph character.
